ddls:
CREATE TABLE "population_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "var" TEXT /* Variable being measured (e.g., population) */,
  "mode" TEXT /* Mode of measurement (e.g., AsTheCrowFlies) */,
  "span" INTEGER /* Spatial span or radius in meters */,
  "value" REAL /* Calculated value for the given variable and span */,
  "time_period" TEXT /* Time period for which the data is relevant */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., census, survey) */,
  "accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy or confidence level of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id", "span", "mode"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_var FOREIGN KEY ("var") REFERENCES variables ("var_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographic_areas" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographic area */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the geographic area */,
  "center_coordinates" TEXT /* Coordinates of the center of the area */,
  "area_type" TEXT /* Type of geographic area (e.g., city, region) */,
  "area_size" REAL /* Size of the geographic area in square kilometers */,
  "population_class" TEXT /* Population class of the area (e.g., small, medium, large) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_modes" (
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement mode */,
  "mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement mode */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement mode */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used for the measurement mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spatial_spans" (
  "span_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spatial span */,
  "span_value" INTEGER /* Value of the span in meters */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the span */,
  "span_type" TEXT /* Type of span (e.g., buffer, radius) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("span_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variables" (
  "var_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variable */,
  "var_name" TEXT /* Name of the variable */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the variable */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the variable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("var_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, city planner, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geographic area accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES geographic_areas ("area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the population data */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was released */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "changes_summary" TEXT /* Summary of changes in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES population_data ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geographic area */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for the prediction */,
  "predicted_population" REAL /* Predicted population count */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "model_used" TEXT /* Predictive model used for the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES geographic_areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "viz_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geographic area visualized */,
  "viz_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., map, chart) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was created */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the visualization */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* Users or departments the visualization is shared with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("viz_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES geographic_areas ("area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geographic area covered in the report */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES geographic_areas ("area_id")
)
